sys_script_client.description:
As a Tasker User, on a "New Top Task" form loaded from the Tasker Portal, when the "Select to Create Multiple Subtasks" is selected, I will see a second checkbox labeled "Check for Subtasks in Serial". (default unchecked)
As a user, if I check the box, the text will display "Uncheck for Subptasks in Parallel"
sys_script_client.name: Task - onChange Serial Flag
